scripts.cleanup:deps: npx depcheck && npm prune && npm dedupe
scripts.fonts:extract: npm run fonts:cascadia && npm run fonts:plex
scripts.fonts:cascadia: shx cp node_modules/@fontsource/cascadia-code/files/cascadia-code-latin-{200,300,400,500,600,700}-normal.woff2 public/fonts && shx cp node_modules/@fontsource/cascadia-code/files/cascadia-code-latin-ext-{200,300,400,500,600,700}-normal.woff2 public/fonts
scripts.fonts:plex: shx cp node_modules/@fontsource/ibm-plex-sans/files/ibm-plex-sans-latin-{200,300,400,500,600,700}-normal.woff2 public/fonts && shx cp node_modules/@fontsource/ibm-plex-sans/files/ibm-plex-sans-latin-ext-{200,300,400,500,600,700}-normal.woff2 public/fonts
